channel.title: Living on Guide Japan — Life in Japan for Foreigners
channel.description: Recent content in Living on Guide Japan — Life in Japan for Foreigners

item.title: Cost of Living in Tokyo 2025: Complete Monthly Breakdown
item.description:
Tokyo has a reputation for being expensive — but is it really? Compared to cities like London, New York, or Sydney, Tokyo is surprisingly affordable once you know where to look. Here’s a real monthly breakdown for expats in 2025.

Monthly Budget: Tokyo at a Glance

Expense Category Budget Comfortable Comfortable+
Rent (1K/1DK) ¥60,000–80K ¥90,000–130K ¥150,000+
Food & groceries ¥25,000 ¥40,000 ¥60,000+
Transport ¥8,000 ¥12,000 ¥20,000
Utilities ¥10,000 ¥15,000 ¥20,000
Phone plan ¥2,500 ¥4,000 ¥7,000
Health insurance ¥5,000–10K ¥15,000 ¥25,000
Entertainment ¥10,000 ¥25,000 ¥50,000+
Total estimate ¥120–150K ¥200–250K ¥330K+

In USD (at ¥150/$1): Budget ~$800–1,000/month, Comfortable ~$1,300–1,700/month.
